## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `bun run test`, `bun run typecheck`, and `bun run lint` pass locally
- [ ] Changeset added (`bun run changeset`) — required for changes to published packages, skip for docs/examples/website-only changes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or public API changed (package README, `docs/`, or website)
- [ ] `bun.lock` committed if any `package.json` changed
